inputs.price_source: Yahoo WDC close (fetch pending mechanical refresh)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 continuing OCF $1.691B minus capital spending $412M divided by 359M diluted shares (10-K FY2025 ended 2025-06-27)
inputs.normalization_note: Continuing HDD operations after SanDisk spin; 9M FY2026 annualized owner cash ~$8.6/sh flagged [HUMAN REVIEW] for cycle peak vs normalized base

bear.notes: HDD shipment pause after cloud nearline build-out; pricing pressure in duopoly

base.notes: Nearline exabyte growth moderates; margin holds on WDC+Seagate duopoly; buybacks continue

bull.notes: AI data-center nearline HDD demand sustains double-digit exabyte growth and pricing

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 28.8% retained Sandisk stake after flash spin-off (10-K FY2025); SNDK trades separately

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Cloud/nearline HDD demand in continuing revenue $9.52B FY2025 (+50.6% YoY)

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Standard manufacturer balance sheet post-spin; no land/NAV misstatement

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: HDD sales recognized on shipment; no material deferred-revenue backlog

options.label: 28.8% retained Sandisk Corporation equity (post spin-off)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Retained flash stake marked at fair value through earnings; not in Lawrence FCF₀ — overlay uses SNDK market cap × 28.8% with haircut for lock-up/tax

growth_explanation.mechanism: Cloud and AI data-center nearline HDD demand drives exabyte shipments and mix shift to higher-capacity drives; duopoly with Seagate supports pricing.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 continuing revenue +50.6% YoY; Q3 FY2026 9M revenue $9.17B vs $6.92B prior
growth_explanation.stress: Bear assumes nearline digestion and cyclical volume decline like prior HDD downcycles

human_review.normalized_fcf_note: 9M FY2026 annualized owner cash ~$8.6/sh vs FY2025 $3.56/sh — confirm cycle normalization before stance change
